hero.designNotes: Deep-burgundy-and-gold luxury Gujarati wedding hero. The background is a rich radial gradient from burnt sienna to near-black, layered with two animated glow blobs (gold left, maroon right) and a subtle film-grain texture for depth. Two slowly counter-rotating mandala rings built entirely in CSS using repeating-conic-gradient frame the center composition. The layout uses a 3-column CSS grid — two slim decorative side columns with vertical text pills, diamond gems, and gradient lines flanking a central content column. The hero opens with a glass-morphism badge announcing the cultural occasion, followed by a Gujarati script Ganesh blessing line in Noto Serif Gujarati. The couple's names are rendered in Rozha One at display scale (up to 128px) with a warm gold metallic gradient and drop-shadow, offset left/right for asymmetric tension, bridged by a Cormorant Garamond italic ampersand. An ornamental gem divider separates the names from a Cormorant Garamond italic hero message. Event details sit in a glass-morphism panel with uppercase label/value pairs. The primary CTA is a pill button with a warm gradient and a CSS shimmer-on-hover effect. A toran-inspired bottom strip uses marigold and leaf emoji with a gentle bob animation to evoke the festive entrance decoration of Gujarati weddings — all without any image assets. Six floating teardrop petals drift upward in staggered CSS animations. Fully responsive: side columns collapse at 640px, names and details reflow, CTA becomes full-width.
